title: Cashew Crusted Fish
description: A simple yet flavorful dish that combines the crunch of cashews with the tender flakiness of fish. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Prepare the cashew crust by mixing together cashews and flaky coating mix (if using).
Season the fish fillets with friendly seasoning.
Dip each fish fillet into the cashew crust, pressing gently to adhere.
Place the coated fish on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle with a dash of lemon juice.
Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until cooked through.
Serve with tangy mayonnaise on top.
Stir-fry some vegetables (e.g. asparagus, bell peppers) as a side dish, if desired.
